author: N23eos
description: Alternative graph view for large vaults with 3D visualization, clusters, PageRank and color schemes. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: n23eos
manifest.description: Explore large vaults as an interactive 3D graph with clusters, PageRank, color schemes and metric-driven node encoding.
manifest.name: Advanced Graph View

name: Advanced Graph View

releases.author: n23eos
releases.description:
Manifest fix release — the repository is now public, so `manifest.json` in the root can be read by BRAT and the community-plugin validator.

## Install

**BRAT:** add `n23eos/advanced_graph_view`.

**Manually:** download `main.js`, `manifest.json` and `styles.css` into `<vault>/.obsidian/plugins/graph-insight/`, then enable **Graph Insight** in Settings → Community plugins.

## Fixed

- Repository visibility (the manifest could not be validated while private)
- `authorUrl` added; `author` now matches the GitHub account

## New since 0.1.0

- **View presets** — save the whole look (metric channels, colors, physics, 3D, layers) under a name and switch between saved views from the top of the panel
- **Cursor tools** — pick what a click does: open the note, show its N-hop neighborhood, trace the shortest link path between two notes, hide, or pin
- **Tag and folder filters** — dedicated multi-select dropdowns next to the search bar
- **Overlays now highlight** — orphans, dead ends and broken links light up in the accent color with a match count, instead of only dimming everything else
- **Elastic links** — a springiness control; dragging a node pulls its neighborhood harder and the layout rebounds afterwards
- **Regroup** — toggling free layout (or the physics button) releases drag pins and re-forms the cloud
- **Semantics is clearer** — consent is remembered instead of re-prompting, and a status chip shows model download and indexing progress
- Cluster bubbles follow the camera in 3D; fly-through zoom, strafe and hover emphasis refined
releases.name: Graph Insight 0.1.1

releases.author: n23eos
releases.description:
First public build. An advanced replacement for Obsidian's Graph View, built for vaults where the default graph turns into a hairball.

## Install manually

Download `main.js`, `manifest.json` and `styles.css` into
`<vault>/.obsidian/plugins/graph-insight/`, then enable **Graph Insight** in
Settings → Community plugins.

## What's in it

**Rendering** — WebGL via Pixi v8: 10,000 nodes and 30,000 edges at 50+ FPS. Edges render as a single GPU quad mesh; layout, graph metrics and embeddings each run in their own Web Worker, so the UI thread never computes physics.

**Node encoding** — put any of 12 metrics on size, color or glow: PageRank, opens (all-time / 90 / 30 / 7 days), edit recency, note age, in/out links, file size, folder, tag, cluster. Custom gradients, contrast control and presets.

**3D mode** — the layout runs in real 3D and is projected through a flying camera: orbit with the left button, fly through the cloud with the wheel, strafe with the right button. Depth is driven by physics, clusters or note age.

**Search** — the core graph syntax (`path:`, `tag:`, `file:`, `-exclude`) plus `opened:>10`, `opened:30d>5`, `edited:<30d`, `created:>2024-01-01`, `links:>5`, `inlinks:0`, `unresolved:>0`, `cluster:"name"` and `content:` full-text. Live highlighting while typing, hard filter on Enter, saved presets and tag/folder completion.

**Structure** — PageRank and Louvain clustering with automatic TF-IDF naming, cluster bubbles, overlays for orphans, dead ends and broken links.

**Semantics (opt-in)** — a local embedding model finds notes that are similar in meaning but not linked, draws them as dashed edges, and creates the link on click. Runs fully offline after a one-time consented model download.

**Also** — usage tracking, timeline playback of vault growth, session trail, insights dashboard, focus mode, lasso selection, PNG/JSON/GEXF export.

## Privacy

No telemetry, no analytics. The only network request is the optional one-time embedding-model download, and it happens only after you explicitly enable semantics.

108 unit tests, eslint clean.
releases.name: Graph Insight 0.1.0
